compatibleScales.musicalContext: Contains all chord tones (C, E, G) plus safe extensions (D, A). The most foolproof scale for C major improvisation with zero avoid notes.
compatibleScales.commonUse: The go-to scale for C major in rock, country, blues, and pop. Guaranteed consonance. Ideal for beginners and memorable hooks.
compatibleScales.famousExamples: Target the root (C) and major 3rd (E) for resolution. The A (13th) adds brightness. Perfect for simple, memorable melodies.

compatibleScales.musicalContext: The fundamental scale of C major. No sharps or flats - the natural scale. Contains all chord tones and available extensions for complete melodic freedom.
compatibleScales.commonUse: Complete freedom over C major. The foundation of Western music. Works in classical, pop, jazz, folk, and all styles.
compatibleScales.famousExamples: All notes work over I major. The F (11th) can sound suspended - resolve to E or G. Emphasize chord tones on downbeats.

compatibleScales.musicalContext: Raises F to F# (#11) creating dreamy, ethereal major sound. The characteristic Lydian sound - bright, floating, modern.
compatibleScales.commonUse: Use for Cmaj7#11 or modern I major sounds. Essential for film scores, jazz, fusion, and progressive rock. Creates magical, floating quality.
compatibleScales.famousExamples: Emphasize the #11 (F#) for signature Lydian color. Creates uplifting, optimistic quality. Perfect for sustained I major chords.

compatibleScales.musicalContext: Lowers B to Bb (b7) creating dominant 7th character. Perfect for bluesy, rock-oriented C major. The I7 sound common in blues.
compatibleScales.commonUse: Perfect for C7 chords and blues/rock vamps. Essential for jam bands, folk rock, and Americana. Use when you want major with bluesy flavor.
compatibleScales.famousExamples: The Bb (b7) creates bluesy edge. Emphasize E and Bb for dominant character. Great for rock and blues guitar.

compatibleScales.relationship: Built on V - creates bluesy major sound
compatibleScales.musicalContext: All notes diatonic to C major. The minor pentatonic from the V creates safe blues-rock sound over I major.
compatibleScales.commonUse: Essential rock guitar scale over C major. Safe and bluesy. Perfect for rock solos in major keys from Led Zeppelin to modern rock.
compatibleScales.famousExamples: Creates bluesy major without clash. The Bb adds slight tension. Classic rock guitar approach to major chords.
